description_long: This is a modern, low-profile wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and four angled legs. The front features a combination of two large white doors on the left and two white drawers on the right, separated by a central open shelving section with three compartments. The top, sides, and back are finished in a warm, medium-brown wood grain, giving it a contemporary yet natural appearance. The open shelves are ideal for storing electronics or decorative items, while the doors and drawers provide concealed storage. The cabinet's clean lines and minimalist design make it suitable for urban interiors such as living rooms, lobbies, or office waiting areas. The absence of visible handles on the doors and drawers suggests a push-to-open mechanism or integrated pulls.
description: A modern, low-profile wooden cabinet with white doors and drawers, open central shelves, and angled legs. Its minimalist design features a warm wood finish and concealed storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two white doors, two white drawers, and three open central shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood grain panel and angled leg, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, continuous wood grain surface with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wood panel and angled leg.
